ephemeralOption: Set to "True" to show the response only to you
softmurmurDesc: [Create your own mix of background noise](https://asoftmurmur.com/)
waytogoDesc: [Draw lines and walk through a forest while creating music](http://a-way-to-go.com/)
waterphysicsDesc: [Create music by clicking dots on the roster](https://madebyevan.com/webgl-water/)
strobeDesc: [Stare at the middle for 30 seconds for to experience an optical illusion](https://strobe.cool/)
lightsDesc: [Musical experience to the tunes of Ellie Goulding's Lights](https://helloenjoy.itch.io/lights)
patapapDesc: [Press random keys on your keyboard for a musical and visual experience](https://www.patatap.com/)
neonflamesDesc: [Draw nebula like art (many options in top right corner)](https://29a.ch/sandbox/2011/neonflames/#)
particledreamDesc: [Move at changeable speed through colorful fractals that never end](http://www.iamnop.com/particles/)
cosmicsymbolismDesc: [Never ending cosmic zooming experience (click and drag for speed)](https://www.cosmic-symbolism.com/)
hopalongDesc: [A never ending orbits visualizer. Use keys and mouse to increase speed and angle](http://iacopoapps.appspot.com/hopalongwebgl/)
mynoiseDesc: [Ambient noise generator with a variety of themes from rain to black holes to busy cafe to kitten purrs.](https://mynoise.net/)
mrdoobharmonyDesc: [Make art by sketching with different materials and colors (many more triptoys at the top of the page)](https://mrdoob.com/#/120/harmony)
ballsdemoDesc: [Colorful balls that follow your mouse (Enable fullscreen for best effect)](https://testdrive-archive.azurewebsites.net/Graphics/TouchEffects/Default.html)
